prompt: Create an ultra-realistic vertical smartphone selfie photo of a cute young woman in a cozy softly lit bedroom, shot from a high slightly downward angle with her arms extended toward the camera as if taking the picture herself. She has long glossy black hair styled in loose waves with a black ribbon bow hair clip on the left side, pale skin, and a delicate feminine look; her face is intentionally covered by a large centered pixelated square privacy blur in muted brown-gray tones. She wears a white fitted camisole with lace trim under a fluffy fuzzy cardigan, plus a small pearl pendant necklace. The composition is close and intimate, showing her upper body and arms prominently in the foreground. The background is a tidy warm-toned bedroom with an unmade cream bed on the left, a small shelf or dresser holding cosmetics and a glowing candle or lamp, two small pastel wall prints, tall beige wardrobe doors on the right, and a cream handbag hanging from a hook. Use natural indoor lighting, soft shadows, realistic skin and fabric textures, casual Japanese social-media selfie aesthetic, shallow depth of field, 9:16 portrait framing, high-resolution phone camera realism.
